title: MedicalInvoice
description: Standard UK private medical invoice record. Field set follows Healthcode ePractice/VEDA electronic billing requirements (healthcode.co.uk/help-and-support/epractice-getting-started/), HMRC invoice requirements (gov.uk/invoicing-and-taking-payment-from-customers), and the VAT medical exemption (VAT Notice 701/57). Lexical patterns here catch shape only; checksums, dictionary membership, and cross-field rules run in backend/validation/rules/.

invoice_number.description: Unique sequential identifier. HMRC: every invoice must carry a unique identification number; VATREC5010.

practice.description: Supplier identity. HMRC: business name, address and contact information.

patient.description: Patient identity. Healthcode: name, DOB, sex, address and postcode drive the insurer demographic match; mismatches are a top rejection cause.

nhs_number.description: Optional. 10 digits, Modulus-11 check digit per NHS Data Dictionary; verified arithmetically in rules/formats.py.

insurer_id.description: Key into dictionaries/insurers.json; selects the validation ruleset.

membership_number.description: Mandatory. Format enforced per insurer where published (Healthcode validation rules); Bupa/AXA/Aviva/Vitality formats are unpublished and validated by demographic match instead.

pre_authorisation.description: Optional, but if present must match the insurer's format (VEDA: 'Authorisation Code - Must be in the format [...]').

gmc_number.description: GMC reference number: 7 digits (NHS Data Dictionary attribute).

payee_provider_id.description: Who gets paid; must be a recognised payee mapped to the insurer (VEDA: 'Payee Provider - Invalid Code').

treatment_site_id.description: Facility; must be mapped to the insurer (VEDA: 'Hospital Number - Not Mapped').

care_setting.description: Must be clinically consistent with the procedures billed (VEDA setting rule).

diagnoses.description: ICD-10 codes. Required content for insurers flagged requires_icd10 (Bupa, AXA Health, Vitality); enforced in rules/cross_field.py.

procedures.description: CCSD schedule codes (the field Healthcode UIs label 'OPCS Code'). Format and schedule membership checked in rules/.

lines.description: HMRC: clear description of what is charged, with amounts.

service_code.description: Key into dictionaries/charge_codes.json (Industry Standard Code mapping).

vat_rate.description: Medical services are VAT-exempt (Notice 701/57); a non-zero rate on an exempt service is flagged.
